title: atropis palustris subsp. convoluta
intro: Atropis palustris subsp. convoluta is a subspecies of the atropis palustris plant, commonly known as the convolvulus bugbane or bugbane, which is a perennial plant in the Apiaceae family. The medicinal properties of Atropis palustris subsp. convoluta include its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to alleviate pain, reduce inflammation, and treat respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis. Atropis palustris subsp. convoluta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its dried roots and rhizomes can be used in folk medicine.
